title: PPIP - Login during Onboarding - Share Data toggle is not present
scenario: Share Data toggle is not displayed in App Settings > General > Account for logged-in users, as expected since they are automatically allowed to send data.
steps: 1. Launch the app and go through the onboarding flow.
2. Log in to an existing account during the onboarding process.
3. Navigate to App Settings > General > Account.
4. Observe whether the 'Share Data' toggle or any related info is displayed.
expected: Since logged-in users are automatically allowed to send data, the Share Data toggle/info should not be displayed.
